name: accounting firms processing 10–50 tax returns/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 tax returns/month, manual tax return generation causes delays in filing and increased client dissatisfaction. We automate the generation and filing of tax returns instead of manual tax preparation software.
problem_solved: Manual tax return generation and filing is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual tax return generation and filing is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–50 tax returns/month, manual tax return generation causes delays in filing and increased client dissatisfaction. We automate the generation and filing of tax returns instead of manual tax preparation software.

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–50 tax returns/month, manual tax return generation causes delays in filing and increased client dissatisfaction. We automate the generation and filing of tax returns instead of manual tax preparation software.
